randomGreetings: Hope you have a great day! ☀️
intro.aboutMe: As a frontend engineer, I specialize in building responsive and high-performance UIs across web, mobile, and desktop platforms. I have experience developing Web3 DApps and enterprise service platforms, with a strong focus on writing maintainable code and delivering smooth user experiences. I value teamwork and leverage my background in design to implement user-centric UI/UX with careful attention to detail.

personal.title: Personal Projects & Technical Skill Enhancement
description: Developed a real-time chat app using MERN stack + Socket.io
Built a Todo app using Go (Fiber) + React
Currently developing a chat app using Next.js + Redis
Studied frontend TDD (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, etc.)
Updated and redesigned portfolio site with i18n (multilingual) support

details.overview: During the first half of 2025, I focused on strengthening my skills through various personal projects, particularly in areas not yet fully utilized in real-world environments. I emphasized mastering practical technologies such as real-time communication, test-driven development (TDD), Go backend, and building stable frontend applications using TypeScript.
challenges: Understanding overall architecture and state management in full-stack development
Overcoming lack of experience in frontend test automation
Implementing portfolio site updates, redesign, and multilingual support using i18n
achievements: Completed real-time chat app using MERN + Socket.io
Developed Todo app with Go (Fiber) + React, gaining experience in REST API design and integration
Continuing to learn Redis and high-performance processing with Next.js + Redis project
Accumulated practical experience in TDD using Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress
Successfully updated and redesigned portfolio site, personally designing and implementing multilingual support (i18n)

confidential_japanese_startup.title: Frontend development support for new B2C business initiatives (Fully Remote)
description: Frontend development for Japanese B2C service platform
Built and maintained optimized pages for 6 business types
Developed reusable UI components and implemented responsive design

details.overview: Collaborated remotely as a frontend developer for a Japanese B2C service platform. Joined the project shortly before release and contributed under tight deadlines to meet the launch schedule. Built and maintained dynamic application pages tailored to six distinct business types. Developed reusable UI components using shadcn/ui and styled them with Tailwind CSS for consistent, responsive design. Designed multi-step forms with React Hook Form and Zod for input validation and error handling. Integrated RESTful APIs using fetch and managed client-side state with React Context API. Monitored system health and resolved issues post-launch through continuous tracking with Datadog.
challenges: Joined the project shortly before release and needed to complete stable frontend development and deployment under a tight schedule
Faced complexity in efficiently implementing and maintaining customized pages tailored for six different business types
Required to utilize various technologies such as React Hook Form, Zod, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS to deliver a consistent user experience and responsive UI simultaneously
achievements: Successfully built and supported the launch of dynamic pages for six business types within a strict deadline
Designed and implemented reusable UI components, greatly improving development efficiency and code maintainability
Ensured post-launch system stability through continuous monitoring with Datadog and prompt issue resolution

turingum_web03_tokyo_beast_base.title: Support services for Web3 product campaign site and system development (Fully Remote)
description: Independently developed the NFT Staking page in the BASE section and handled design renewal for several pages
Developed multilingual support and multilingual SMS verification features
Adjusted overall page styles and fixed bugs, including mobile responsiveness

details.overview: I initially participated in the development of the “NFT Staking” page in the BASE section, and later joined the frontend development team. I led style adjustments for the homepage marquee area, design renewal and multilingual support for the “GACHA” and “MARKET” pages, and performed fine style tuning across the entire homepage. I integrated multilingual SMS verification and enhanced mobile responsiveness. For existing frontend bug fixes, I collaborated closely with the previous developer. I utilized wagmi and RainbowKit for wallet integration, GSAP for animations, and SWR for data management. Regarding the “Mystery Ticket” page, I handled style and functional modifications due to planning changes, as well as additional development involving direct Web3 and API integration.
challenges: Overcame technical challenges while implementing complex features during Web3 wallet integration and direct API integration
Performed UI/UX optimization considering both multilingual support and mobile responsiveness
Identified and quickly fixed numerous bugs in code written by existing frontend developers within the team, improving service stability
achievements: Independently developed the “NFT Staking” page, collaborating with backend developers to review and resolve API latency issues, successfully delivering an interactive user experience
Promptly handled design updates and multilingual support for renewed pages, enhancing service quality and accessibility
Collaborated with responsible developers to swiftly fix critical bugs, significantly improving overall project stability

turingum_web03_tokyo_beast_mystery_ticke.title: Development support for a Web3 product campaign site (Fully Remote)
description: Frontend development of a highly animated Web3 campaign site
Implemented high-performance animations by integrating GSAP with Next.js
Maintained Mystery Ticket feature and supported new development in the BASE section

details.overview: I was responsible for frontend development, multilingual support, and code refactoring for a dynamic, animation-heavy Web3 campaign site. Through thorough research, I successfully integrated GSAP with Next.js to enable smooth and efficient animations. Subsequently, I took over the initial "Mystery Ticket" feature and supported frontend development for the BASE section, including handling confidential new tasks.
challenges: Implementing animation-heavy designs optimized for performance within a Next.js environment
Integrating GSAP into Next.js with minimal impact on rendering and project structure
Managing inherited code from previous developers while working on new features simultaneously
achievements: Successfully integrated GSAP into Next.js, enabling smooth and efficient animations
Took over and enhanced the "Mystery Ticket" feature, improving and extending its functionality
Supported frontend development of the BASE section and handled confidential new tasks smoothly

turingum_web03_wizardry_campaign.title: Developed a campaign site for a Web3.0 project (Fully Remote)
description: Frontend architecture design and development for a Web3.0 campaign site
Implemented multilingual support, responsive UI, and smart contract integration
Developed a Merkle Tree CLI tool

details.overview: Through a connection with Turingum K.K., a Japanese Web3 consulting company, I contributed to the development of a Web3 campaign site for a major Japanese gaming company. As this was my first Web3 project, I received valuable advice from key contacts at Turingum, which enabled smooth project execution and a successful release. I led frontend architecture design and implementation using Next.js, focusing on multilingual support, code refactoring, responsive design, and direct integration with blockchain smart contracts. I also collaborated with a designer to enhance the UI by creating assets and improving usability. One of the key contacts requested that I develop a Merkle tree CLI tool. Although it was my first time creating such a tool, I completed it without issues. Later, the key contacts highly praised the tool and asked for permission to use it internally. Additionally, I received a request to use the frontend architecture I built as training material for junior developers.
challenges: It was my first Web3 project, so I had to quickly gain practical knowledge about blockchain and smart contract integration
I needed to implement a complex multilingual and responsive architecture within a short timeframe
Developing a Merkle tree CLI tool was a completely new and technically challenging task for me
achievements: With guidance from Turingum K.K., I quickly caught up with Web3 concepts and contributed to smooth project delivery
Successfully led the design and implementation of a multilingual, responsive frontend using Next.js
Completed a fully functional Merkle tree CLI tool on first attempt, which was well-received and approved for internal use

confidential_korean_startup.title: Frontend Maintenance & Development for a Tennis Court Reservation Mobile App(Fully Remote)
description: Maintained and extended a React Native sports reservation app
Fixed bugs, improved UI/UX, and refactored code for maintainability
Managed releases for both iOS and Android platforms

details.overview: I participated as a freelance frontend developer in the maintenance and new feature development project for a React Native mobile app operated by a Korean startup running a sports reservation platform. Since the app had already been released, I initially took responsibility for quickly fixing bugs. By promptly resolving issues and updating the app on each platform’s store, we were able to alleviate user inconveniences. Later, I was assigned to refactor existing code and improve UI/UX. I was also invited to participate in new development. Throughout the project, I prioritized user experience and service reliability, collaborating closely with the client to ensure smooth progress.
challenges: Fixing bugs in legacy code without detailed documentation
Ensuring compatibility and stability across both iOS and Android platforms
Improving UI/UX while minimizing disruption to existing features
achievements: Resolved critical bugs and released timely updates to app stores
Refactored major parts of the codebase for better readability and maintainability
Enhanced user experience through UI/UX improvements and performance tuning

dmonster_dongnaebook.title: [Delivery App] Frontend Development for POS System (Desktop) and Store Owner Mobile App
description: Developed a mobile app with React Native and a POS desktop app with Electron + React
Implemented core features such as login, order management, and receipt printing
Enabled receipt printing without printer drivers using SerialPort communication

details.overview: As a freelance frontend developer, I was responsible for developing the POS system and the store-owner mobile application for a Korean delivery service platform. The mobile app was developed using React Native for both iOS and Android, while the POS system was implemented as a desktop application using Electron and React. I developed key features such as login (SNS, general, auto), store management (holiday settings for all or specific stores), and real-time order status display. Later, my responsibilities expanded to include SerialPort communication and receipt printing features in the desktop application. One of the most technically challenging tasks was implementing receipt printing in the Electron environment without relying on printer drivers. By referencing C# WinPlatform and Python Qt implementations and exploring various libraries, I was able to successfully implement the feature using SerialPort communication.
challenges: Managing the development of both mobile and desktop applications simultaneously
Overcoming the technical challenge of printing receipts in Electron without printer drivers
Finding a stable solution for SerialPort communication with limited official documentation
achievements: Developed a mobile app for store owners using React Native, supporting both iOS and Android
Built a POS desktop application with Electron and React, ensuring stable performance across features
Successfully implemented SerialPort-based receipt printing by referencing C# and Python examples

dmonster_moli.title: Frontend Development for Desktop Application for Simultaneous Interpretation Listeners
description: Added features to a simultaneous interpretation listener mobile app and handled app store deployment
Developed a desktop version using Electron, implementing voice call and audio visualization features
Overcame Agora SDK limitations by customizing the Web SDK for stable integration

details.overview: I took over a mobile app project for simultaneous interpretation listeners from another engineer and was responsible for developing additional features and submitting the app to both the iOS and Android stores. Later, at the client's request, I led the development of a desktop version of the same application using Electron. The app featured real-time voice call functionality for both interpreter and listener modes using Agora SDK, window resizing tailored for macOS and Windows, downloadable material support, and sound visualization for live voice volume levels. During development, I faced integration issues with the Electron version of Agora SDK. As no stable solution was available at the time, I implemented a creative workaround by customizing the Web SDK to work within Electron, which allowed the app to function as intended. This experience highlighted the importance of flexible thinking and creative problem-solving.
challenges: Taking over an existing mobile app project mid-development and understanding legacy code
Resolving compatibility issues when integrating Agora SDK into the Electron environment
Adapting Web SDK for desktop use due to lack of official support for Electron
achievements: Successfully implemented interpreter/listener voice call features using Agora SDK
Built a cross-platform desktop app (macOS/Windows) with real-time sound visualization and material download features
Overcame SDK limitations through creative problem-solving and custom integration

dmonster_mozaiq.title: Support for the development of a mobile application for vacation cottage (rental villa) booking
description: Developed WebView-based mobile app for iOS and Android
Implemented Deeplink sharing, SNS login, image push notifications
Collaborated with PHP backend engineer to integrate core features

details.overview: I received hardcoded source code and was responsible for making modifications and developing new features. The project was implemented using a WebView-based architecture, and I collaborated closely with a PHP engineer. I developed the mobile app for both iOS and Android using WebView, implementing features such as SMS and SNS sharing via Deeplink, social login, payment module integration, chatbot integration, and image-based push notifications for both background and foreground modes.
challenges: Needed to quickly understand and extend a hardcoded codebase while ensuring new features didn’t break existing functionality
Faced technical complexity in integrating native features such as Deeplink and image-based notifications within a WebView structure
Resolved platform-specific inconsistencies and authentication issues during SNS login and payment module integration
achievements: Successfully refactored and stabilized a complex hardcoded codebase while integrating new functionality
Implemented user-friendly features such as SNS/SMS sharing with Deeplink, chatbot integration, and image notifications
Seamlessly integrated Kakao, Naver, Apple, and Facebook login along with IAMPORT payment gateway for both iOS and Android

dmonster_vegastong.title: Frontend Development for a Las Vegas Local Communication App (Project Paused)
description: Participated in mobile tourism app development for the U.S. branch
Implemented SMS sharing via Deeplink and SNS login functionalities
Developed category-based and posting search features

details.overview: Responsible for developing a mobile tourism app for the client’s U.S. branch. Developed for both iOS and Android using React Native. Implemented Deeplink-based SMS sharing, SNS and standard login features, as well as category-based search and posting search for users and administrators. The project was halted during development.
challenges: Addressed compatibility and authentication issues while integrating multiple SNS login APIs (Kakao, Naver, Facebook, Apple)
Overcame complexities in implementing Deeplink-based SMS sharing functionality
Optimized WebView-based map features for smooth integration within the mobile app
achievements: Developed core features of the mobile tourism app optimized for both iOS and Android environments
Successfully implemented Deeplink SMS sharing and various SNS login features
Built efficient search capabilities for both users and administrators

dmonster_diningcode.title: Frontend Renewal for a Korean Food Information Platform
description: Led frontend architecture design and implementation for site renewal
Developed responsive UI for desktop and mobile using Next.js and Styled-Components
Managed team task distribution and schedule, handled AWS deployment environment
Proposed UI/UX improvements enhancing overall service quality

details.overview: Led the overall frontend architecture design and implementation for the site redevelopment project. As project leader (PL), effectively delegated development tasks among team members, overseeing schedules and ensuring code quality. Implemented responsive UI using Next.js and Styled-Components for both desktop and mobile platforms. Managed key feature development as well as AWS deployment environments. Proactively proposed and executed UI/UX improvements to enhance user experience.
challenges: Successfully refactored complex legacy code to meet tight redevelopment deadlines
Delivered optimized UI designs for both desktop and mobile reflecting diverse UX requirements
Ensured efficient project progress through effective team coordination and schedule management
achievements: Designed the entire frontend architecture and led team task distribution to deliver the project smoothly
Improved service quality by proposing and implementing UI/UX enhancements
Established and maintained stable AWS deployment environments for seamless live service

dmonster_todaysorder.title: Frontend Development for User/Owner Delivery Apps & POS System
description: Developed POS desktop app and multi-platform mobile apps for a client benchmarking a popular delivery app
Real-time order status management with Redux-saga and existing code improvements
Implemented automatic receipt printing for POS printers and added UI animation effects

details.overview: I was responsible for developing a desktop POS system app for owners and a multi-platform mobile app for iOS and Android, based on a client request benchmarking a popular delivery app. The POS desktop app was implemented using Electron and React, while the mobile app was developed using React Native. Redux-saga was introduced for real-time order status monitoring and existing code was improved. Additionally, an automatic receipt printing feature for the POS printer was developed, along with UI animation effects to enhance user experience.
challenges: Managing stable development across both desktop and mobile multi-platform environments
Integrating Redux-saga smoothly for real-time order monitoring alongside existing code
Technical challenges in implementing reliable automatic receipt printing for POS printers across various environments
achievements: Successfully developed a stable POS desktop app using Electron and React
Efficiently built a multi-platform mobile app for iOS and Android with React Native
Enabled smooth real-time order tracking through Redux-saga integration and code improvements
Developed automatic receipt printing functionality, increasing operational efficiency
Enhanced user experience by adding UI animation effects

dmonster_idraw.title: Frontend Development for an Art Education Mobile App
description: Frontend development of iOS/Android basic layouts, login, and detail pages using React Native
Completed work up to pre-API integration stage and performed handover

details.overview: Contributed to the frontend development of an art education mobile app up to the stage before API integration. Developed basic layouts, login, various pages, and detail pages for iOS and Android using React Native. Also performed handover to facilitate smooth API integration in the next phase.
challenges: Developing the frontend before the API was ready, ensuring design and implementation are compatible with future API integration
Implementing stable UI layouts compatible across both iOS and Android platforms
Clearly structuring login and page layouts to enable seamless handover to subsequent developers
achievements: Successfully completed frontend development of basic UI and functionality using React Native before API integration
Delivered consistent user experience with layouts for both iOS and Android platforms
Provided smooth handover to ensure project continuity for API integration phase

dmonster_paper_workshop_partners.title: Frontend Development for Mobile App for Printing Vendors (Online Printing Platform)
description: Developed a B2B mobile app allowing users to request prints and printing companies to bid
Implemented a 1:1 chat system for real-time communication between users and printing companies
Integrated real-time notifications with Redux and FCM, designing alert logic based on order flow

details.overview: I developed a B2B mobile application for printing companies that allows users to submit printing requests and for printing companies to bid on these requests. The app includes a 1:1 chat feature for communication between users and printing companies, enhancing real-time interaction. Additionally, printing companies can propose detailed plans for printing processes within their bids. I implemented the mobile application using React Native for both iOS and Android platforms, focusing on front-end development. Key features include bidding, price proposals, and delivery management for vendors. I also integrated real-time notifications based on Redux and FCM, and designed notification logic for the entire order flow, improving communication and transparency between users and vendors.
challenges: Implementing the bidding and price proposal system while meeting various user requirements.
Resolving synchronization issues between multiple platforms (iOS, Android) while developing the real-time notification system.
Developing an efficient 1:1 chat system for seamless communication between users and printing companies.
achievements: Successfully implemented bidding and price proposal features, facilitating efficient communication between users and printing companies.
Developed a real-time notification system based on Redux and FCM, providing immediate alerts based on order status changes.
Enabled real-time communication between users and printing companies through the 1:1 chat feature, improving communication efficiency and trust.

dmonster_paper_workshop_customers.title: Frontend Development for User-Facing Mobile App (Online Printing Platform)
description: A platform for shopping various print products and ordering quotes from partner vendors.
Dynamic quote request form with info buttons, and 1:1 chat & phone consultation features.
Frontend development of iOS/Android app using React Native, with Android first released.

details.overview: This mobile application is a platform where users can shop for various print products and order quotes from multiple partner vendors. When ordering prints, the quote request form dynamically adjusts based on the type of paper selected, with options like weight and color changing accordingly. Information about each item is provided through buttons on the form. Users can select a vendor from the received bids and, after selecting, view the vendor's information and communicate via 1:1 chat or phone consultation. In this project, I was responsible for the frontend development for both iOS and Android platforms using React Native. Initially, only the Android version was released to the store first.
challenges: Designing and implementing a dynamic quote request form that adapts based on the paper type and user input, ensuring a seamless and intuitive experience for the user.
Ensuring real-time communication through 1:1 chat and phone consultations, providing an efficient way for users to interact with vendors.
Managing the initial release of the Android version while preparing the iOS version, balancing the deployment strategy and meeting deadlines.
achievements: Successfully developed a dynamic quote request form with real-time adjustments based on user choices, improving user engagement and experience.
Implemented a smooth 1:1 chat and phone consultation feature, enhancing communication between users and vendors, leading to higher customer satisfaction.
Completed the Android version and released it successfully to the store first, ensuring a smooth launch and maintaining high-quality standards across both platforms.

dmonster_insadong.title: Full-Stack Development of Tourist Audio Guide App & Admin Page
description: Developed a full-stack tourist audio guide Android app and admin panel
Implemented location-based audio playback, bottom sheet UI, and content sliders
Built admin panel with CodeIgniter to manage audio content and user data

details.overview: I developed a full-stack audio guide mobile application for tourist destinations (Android) along with an admin panel. Using React Native, I implemented features such as real-time location tracking, bottom sheet UI with content sliders, and audio playback. I also developed the admin panel with CodeIgniter (PHP) to manage audio content and user data.
challenges: Implementing complex logic for real-time GPS-based audio content playback
Minimizing UI/UX conflicts between bottom sheet, content slider, and audio player
Designing an efficient admin panel for content management and user operations
achievements: Successfully launched a location-based audio guide app with enhanced user engagement
Created an intuitive UI combining content sliders and audio playback
Delivered a stable admin panel for seamless content and user management

dmonster_gongjuro.title: Frontend Development for a Tourist Guide Mobile Application
description: Developed a mobile app for tourism info (iOS/Android) with React Native
Built community, search, map, and admin list features
Implemented login and signup with SNS integration

details.overview: I developed a mobile application for tourism information on both iOS and Android platforms. Using React Native, I implemented essential user features including standard and social login, registration, and profile editing. I also developed key screens such as the admin's posting list page, a user community blog-style page, a search page, and a WebView-based map view for tourist destinations and recommendations.
challenges: Creating an intuitive blog-style community page for user-generated content
Ensuring stable display of location-based data and recommendations via WebView
Integrating multiple login methods (SNS included) with consistent UX
achievements: Delivered a tourism app combining informative content and user community features
Successfully implemented multi-login and profile features with high stability
Strengthened integration between admin and user-side interfaces

dmonster_factoryful.title: FactoryFul – Map and List Integration Bug Fix
description: Improved map and search result synchronization
Fixed UI/UX bugs on a legacy PHP + jQuery site
Maintained and debugged front-end issues

details.overview: Worked on a legacy website built with PHP and jQuery, resolving synchronization issues between map markers and text-based search results. Focused on fixing front-end bugs and improving the user experience across different pages and devices.
challenges: Fixing desynchronized behavior between map display and search result list
Debugging and maintaining legacy jQuery codebase
Resolving UI inconsistencies and layout bugs across different browsers
achievements: Implemented real-time sync between search results and map markers
Fixed visual bugs and improved cross-browser compatibility
Refactored repetitive jQuery logic for better maintainability
